events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure during form build & bracing, work in progress, on a heavy industrial site. This is a serious safety hazard - formwork failure during concrete pouring can cause catastrophic collapse, injuries, deaths. ACI 347 governs formwork design and construction. Inadequate bracing means non-compliant with engineered design and ACI 347 requirements. Decision: fail. Risk: critical. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 60% since in-progress. Confidence high.

  "rationale": "Inadequate bracing for pour pressure is a critical deficiency under ACI 347, which requires formwork and bracing to be designed and installed to safely resist all anticipated loads including concrete pressure.
